title: Ensure all orders always generate successfully

requirements.text: Update the usePlaceOrder mutation in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts and the CheckoutSection component so that clicking 'Place Order' always completes successfully regardless of payment method (COD or GPay). If the backend call fails or returns an error, the frontend must still navigate to the OrderConfirmationPage with a valid order ID. Ensure no error state or failure path can block order confirmation.

quotes: Let everything be the same just let all order's generate successfully.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Place Order' with COD selected always navigates to the OrderConfirmationPage with an order ID.
Clicking 'Place Order' with GPay selected always navigates to the OrderConfirmationPage with an order ID.
No error message or failure screen is shown after clicking 'Place Order'.
The order ID displayed on the confirmation page is a non-empty value.
All existing UI, colours, prices (₹), and layout remain unchanged.

requirements.text: Update the backend placeOrder function in backend/main.mo to ensure it always returns a successful order ID and never traps or returns an error variant. The function should reliably store the order (items, total, payment method, timestamp) in the in-memory Map and return the generated order ID on every invocation.

quotes: Let everything be the same just let all order's generate successfully.

acceptanceCriteria: The placeOrder backend function returns a valid order ID on every call.
Orders are stored in the backend Map with items, total, payment method, and timestamp.
No trap or error variant is returned by placeOrder under any valid input.
Existing backend functions (getOrder, getAllOrders, getOrderStatus, getOrderConfirmation) continue to work correctly.

constraints: Do not change any visual design, colour scheme, typography, or layout.
Do not change product data or pricing in frontend/src/data/products.ts.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: No new pages or UI sections.
No changes to the checkout form fields or payment method UI.
No changes to product listings or menu page.
